mapper.insert: INSERT INTO train_user_skill ( user_id, skill_name, mastery_score, question_count, last_practice_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{skillName}, #{masteryScore}, #{questionCount}, #{lastPracticeTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )

INSERT INTO train_user_skill ( user_id, skill_name, mastery_score, question_count, last_practice_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.userId}, #{item.skillName}, #{item.masteryScore}, #{item.questionCount}, #{item.lastPracticeTime}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM train_user_skill WHERE user_id = #{userId}
